meta.notes: Alchemons playful lore with unique descriptions per creature. Full 8×17 set.

types.name: Fire
types.description: Born of flame; passionate and volatile.

types.name: Water
types.description: Fluid and adaptive; calm or crushing.

types.name: Steam
types.description: Vapor between fire and water; shifting.

types.name: Mud
types.description: Thick and stubborn mix of earth and water.

creatures.name: Firehorn
creatures.description: Its horn burns like a held flame, and the heat in its stance feels deliberate rather than wild.

creatures.name: Waterhorn
creatures.description: Its smooth crest holds a wet shine, and its stillness feels more like depth than calm.

creatures.name: Earthhorn
creatures.description: A stone-like horn rises from its crown, and its weight settles into the ground as if it belongs there.

creatures.name: Airhorn
creatures.description: Its pale crest curls like a moving current, and the mark at its center makes it look as though the wind had marked it.

creatures.name: Steamhorn
creatures.description: A warm vapor leaks from its crest, blurring its shape as though heat itself is holding it together.

creatures.name: Lavahorn
creatures.description: Molten seams glow through its body, and its horn looks cast from fire before it had time to cool.

creatures.name: Lightninghorn
creatures.description: A bright charge gathers along its crest, and each movement feels one breath away from striking.

creatures.name: Mudhorn
creatures.description: Its horn is thick with dried clay, giving it the look of something shaped by pressure and left to harden.

creatures.name: Icehorn
creatures.description: A frozen crest crowns its head, and the cold around it feels orderly, almost ceremonial.

creatures.name: Dusthorn
creatures.description: Fine grains fall from its pale horn, as if time has already begun wearing it down.

creatures.name: Crystalhorn
creatures.description: Faceted crystal rises from its crown, breaking the light into hard, shifting planes.

creatures.name: Planthorn
creatures.description: Leaf-shaped horns rise from its crown, giving it the look of growth sharpened into defense.

creatures.name: Poisonhorn
creatures.description: Dark venom gathers in the grooves of its horn, staining the air around it with a warning haze.

creatures.name: Spirithorn
creatures.description: Its pale crest seems only partly fixed in this world, wavering at the edges like a bad memory.

creatures.name: Darkhorn
creatures.description: Its dark crest eats the light around it, leaving only a hard stare and a shape that refuses softness.

creatures.name: Lighthorn
creatures.description: Light gathers along its crown in clean pale spikes, giving it the still authority of a living beacon.

creatures.name: Bloodhorn
creatures.description: Its crimson horn carries a steady pulse, as if some older life is still beating through it.

creatures.name: Firekin
creatures.description: Its ember core burns openly through a narrow body, making it feel less alive than continuously kindled.

creatures.name: Waterkin
creatures.description: Its dark form carries a single blue center like deep water held in perfect stillness.

creatures.name: Earthkin
creatures.description: Leaf and bark gather around its frame until it looks less grown than assembled by the ground itself.

creatures.name: Airkin
creatures.description: Pale and light-footed, it seems held together by air and the decision to remain visible.

creatures.name: Steamkin
creatures.description: Soft vapor builds around its bright center, blurring the body into something warm and unfinished.

creatures.name: Lavakin
creatures.description: Its dark frame is split with lava-bright seams, as if the shape was forced to contain more heat than it should.

creatures.name: Lightningkin
creatures.description: Jagged light rises through its upper form in sharp bursts, giving it the tense stillness of a strike not yet released.

creatures.name: Mudkin
creatures.description: Its heavy mud-colored body looks dragged from wet earth and left standing before it could settle.

creatures.name: Icekin
creatures.description: Its ice-bladed crest gives it the clean severity of something preserved instead of born.

creatures.name: Dustkin
creatures.description: Dust gathers around its frame in pale loose shapes, as though the body is always close to coming apart.

creatures.name: Crystalkin
creatures.description: Crystal rises through its form in hard vertical points, making the whole shape feel precise, cold, and chosen.

creatures.name: Plantkin
creatures.description: Leaves and blossoms overtake its small frame until it looks like growth taught to stand upright.

creatures.name: Poisonkin
creatures.description: Its green fire and violet body carry the look of something poisonous made almost ceremonial.

creatures.name: Spiritkin
creatures.description: Its pale body and smoke-like crest make it seem only partly present, like a witness refusing full return.

creatures.name: Darkkin
creatures.description: Its dark form absorbs detail until only a pale center remains, fixed and bright against the refusal of light.

creatures.name: Lightkin
creatures.description: Its gold-bright body is almost reduced to light alone, as though form has become secondary to radiance.

creatures.name: Bloodkin
creatures.description: Its red glow feels less like color than circulation, a living pulse held inside a body that should not contain it.

creatures.name: Firemane
creatures.description: Its bright flame-plume lifts and gutters with every small movement, giving its body the look of a living ember.

creatures.name: Watermane
creatures.description: Its crest curls like a small wave, and its movements leave the feeling of water just settling.

creatures.name: Earthmane
creatures.description: A rough stone crest rises from its crown, giving it the quiet, weathered look of something shaped by old ground.

creatures.name: Airmane
creatures.description: Its pale crest coils upward like stirred air, and it never seems entirely at rest.

creatures.name: Steammane
creatures.description: Its plume thins into vapor at the edges, making it look half formed and hard to hold in focus.

creatures.name: Lavamane
creatures.description: A molten glow moves under its skin, and its crest burns like fire learning how to take shape.

creatures.name: Lightningmane
creatures.description: Its bright crest forks like a bolt, and a nervous charge seems to gather ahead of every quick movement.

creatures.name: Mudmane
creatures.description: Its soft clay-colored crest droops heavily, and damp soil clings to it as though it belongs there.

creatures.name: Icemane
creatures.description: A block-like frozen crest sits above its face, giving it the still, neat cold of preserved water.

creatures.name: Dustmane
creatures.description: Its pale dusty crest looks as if it might crumble at the edges, shedding the feeling of loosened earth.

creatures.name: Crystalmane
creatures.description: A cluster of violet crystal rises through its form, catching light in sharp, deliberate facets.

creatures.name: Plantmane
creatures.description: Its leaf-like crest leans upward as though always seeking light, making the whole body feel quietly alive.

creatures.name: Poisonmane
creatures.description: A dim poisonous tint clings to its crest and skin, soft in shape but not in warning.

creatures.name: Spiritmane
creatures.description: Its dim blue flame-crest gives it the look of a small spirit briefly choosing to remain visible.

creatures.name: Darkmane
creatures.description: Its form almost disappears into shadow, leaving only pale points and a dark flame-shape to mark where it stands.

creatures.name: Lightmane
creatures.description: Its pale golden crest burns with a clean brightness, like a small light refusing to dim.

creatures.name: Bloodmane
creatures.description: Its red crest rises like a living pulse, giving the whole creature the look of blood made briefly visible.

creatures.name: Firemask
creatures.description: Its mask holds fire in deliberate cracks, giving the impression of a sealed face lit from within.

creatures.name: Watermask
creatures.description: Blue lines move across its mask like contained water, calm in shape but deep in feeling.

creatures.name: Earthmask
creatures.description: Its heavy green-marked mask feels carved from old ground, as though the face beneath it was buried on purpose.

creatures.name: Airmask
creatures.description: Its pale mask is crowned with soft vapor and shifting marks, like a face the wind keeps redrawing.

creatures.name: Steammask
creatures.description: Warm mist gathers around its mask, clouding its features until it looks more hidden than seen.

creatures.name: Lavamask
creatures.description: Fire leaks through the splits in its dark mask, as if something hotter was forced to remain inside.

creatures.name: Lightningmask
creatures.description: Jagged gold angles give its mask the look of a warning sign moments before the strike.

creatures.name: Mudmask
creatures.description: Its clay-dark mask sags with damp weight, as though it was shaped by hand and never fully dried.

creatures.name: Icemask
creatures.description: Its frozen crest rises in clean pale blades, giving its mask the ceremonial cold of something preserved.

creatures.name: Dustmask
creatures.description: Its eroded mask carries the abrasion of age, as though time has been scraping at the face for years.

creatures.name: Crystalmask
creatures.description: Crystal points crown its mask in hard blue facets, turning its still gaze into something cut rather than born.

creatures.name: Plantmask
creatures.description: Leaf and blossom gather around its mask, making the whole face look grown into place instead of worn.

creatures.name: Poisonmask
creatures.description: Its mask is stained with a sour green cast, and the expression it holds never feels accidental.

creatures.name: Spiritmask
creatures.description: Pale and smoke-crowned, its mask looks briefly present, like a face remembering how to remain visible.

creatures.name: Darkmask
creatures.description: Its black mask swallows detail until only the violet marks remain, sharp as intent.

creatures.name: Lightmask
creatures.description: Its golden mask is almost featureless in its brightness, as though light itself has taken on the duty of a face.

creatures.name: Bloodmask
creatures.description: Crimson lines pulse across its mask like a living seal, steady enough to feel deliberate.

creatures.name: Bloodmask
creatures.description: A rarer blood-bound form, its red mask glows with the still certainty of something chosen to endure after the rest has failed.

creatures.name: Firepip
creatures.description: An ember-red surface holds a steady heat, and the air around its trailing edge trembles with small sparks.

creatures.name: Waterpip
creatures.description: Smooth and river-bright, it leaves a thin wet shine wherever it passes.

creatures.name: Earthpip
creatures.description: A pebbled surface and low, stubborn shape make it feel heavier than its small form should allow.

creatures.name: Airpip
creatures.description: Its pale edges ripple like loose cloth in a current, even when the air seems still.

creatures.name: Steampip
creatures.description: Warm mist rises from its upper form in quiet curls, softening its outline into vapor.

creatures.name: Lavapip
creatures.description: Molten light moves in narrow seams beneath its skin, and the ground remembers where it stepped.

creatures.name: Lightningpip
creatures.description: A restless charge skips across its surface, brightening its center before the sparks fade.

creatures.name: Mudpip
creatures.description: Clay-dark and low to the ground, it leaves damp prints that harden into rough little shapes.

creatures.name: Icepip
creatures.description: Frost gathers along its surface in pale ridges, and a quiet cold follows close behind it.

creatures.name: Dustpip
creatures.description: Its surface is coated in fine dust, and a faint grit haze trails it like loosened earth.

creatures.name: Crystalpip
creatures.description: Crystal points rise through its form, catching light in hard violet flashes.

creatures.name: Plantpip
creatures.description: Green growth lifts through its form like new leaves, giving it the look of motion caught mid-bloom.

creatures.name: Poisonpip
creatures.description: A thin toxic haze escapes its breath, and its still little smile never feels entirely safe.

creatures.name: Spiritpip
creatures.description: Pale and translucent, it seems to thin at the edges as though it is only partly here.

creatures.name: Darkpip
creatures.description: Its dark surface drinks in the light around it, leaving only dim crimson points to hold your focus.

creatures.name: Lightpip
creatures.description: Clean bands of light glow across its body, as if brightness has settled there and chosen to stay.

creatures.name: Bloodpip
creatures.description: A deep crimson sheen clings to its surface, and something at its center keeps an older rhythm.

creatures.name: Firewing
creatures.description: Its sharp orange frame carries fire as if flight itself were enough to keep it burning.

creatures.name: Waterwing
creatures.description: Its blue body cuts a clean silhouette, all smooth motion and the quiet depth of held water.

creatures.name: Earthwing
creatures.description: Its earth-colored frame feels carved rather than hatched, like a grounded thing that learned how to take air.

creatures.name: Airwing
creatures.description: Pale and weightless, it looks as though a current shaped itself into a body and chose not to disperse.

creatures.name: Steamwing
creatures.description: Soft vapor gathers around its span until the form seems to blur at the edges of its own flight.

creatures.name: Lavawing
creatures.description: Its black body is split by molten seams, giving it the look of a flyer built around contained rupture.

creatures.name: Lightningwing
creatures.description: Jagged blue-black lines pull through its frame like charged fractures waiting for release.

creatures.name: Mudwing
creatures.description: Its heavy brown shape looks pulled from wet soil, as though flight had been added after the mass had already settled.

creatures.name: Icewing
creatures.description: Its ice-cut crest and pale span give it the severe stillness of something made to pass through cold without feeling it.

creatures.name: Dustwing
creatures.description: Dust-colored and wind-worn, it looks close to scattering even while it remains perfectly formed.

creatures.name: Crystalwing
creatures.description: Crystal rises through its form in hard planes, turning flight into something sharp, deliberate, and exact.

creatures.name: Plantwing
creatures.description: Its green frame is overtaken by leaves and stems until it feels less like an animal than growth made airborne.

creatures.name: Poisonwing
creatures.description: Its violet form and green-tipped ridges give it the ceremonial look of poison given permission to fly.

creatures.name: Spiritwing
creatures.description: Its pale body seems to thin into the air around it, as though the creature is only partially committed to remaining here.

creatures.name: Darkwing
creatures.description: Its dark span erases detail until only white points remain, fixed inside a shape the light cannot fully keep.

creatures.name: Lightwing
creatures.description: Its golden body is almost reduced to brightness, as though flight and light have become the same act.

creatures.name: Bloodwing
creatures.description: Its red frame carries the feeling of circulation exposed, a living pulse sharpened into flight.

creatures.name: Simurgh
creatures.description: It rises like a flame made obedient, a warden-shaped fire guarding what survives the burn.

creatures.name: Leviathan
creatures.description: Its body coils around stillness and depth, as though the relic it keeps was meant to drown memory before it surfaced.

creatures.name: Terradon
creatures.description: It carries the patience of buried stone, standing over its relic like pressure given hunger.

creatures.name: Roc
creatures.description: White and impossible, it circles like a warning drawn in air above what should not be reached.

creatures.name: Boilrog
creatures.description: Steam pours from it in heavy veils, hiding the boundary between body, heat, and the thing it was made to keep.

creatures.name: Magmara
creatures.description: Its cracked surface holds a slow catastrophe, as though the relic beneath it is being sealed by force alone.

creatures.name: Raikuma
creatures.description: Dark surface and blue fractures make it feel one impact from release, a sentinel built to answer trespass instantly.

creatures.name: Bogdrya
creatures.description: Its swamp-heavy heads watch without urgency, certain that anything offered to the altar will sink before it reaches truth.

creatures.name: Frowyrm
creatures.description: Its frozen body carries the still cruelty of preserved things, beauty sharpened into refusal.

creatures.name: Ashdjinn
creatures.description: Dust holds its shape only provisionally, as though age and wind agreed to guard the relic together.

creatures.name: Prismalith
creatures.description: Crystal planes rise through it like a deliberate structure, turning light into another layer of concealment.

creatures.name: Botanica
creatures.description: Leaves and branchwork overgrow the form until it resembles a shrine that learned how to move.

creatures.name: Blightfang
creatures.description: Its sagging frame drips a patient toxicity, the kind made to outlast whatever sacrifices feed it.

creatures.name: Wraithord
creatures.description: Thin and half-returned, it stands like a memory forced to keep watch after death should have taken it.

creatures.name: Noctryos
creatures.description: Its span and form drink the light around them, leaving only the stare of something that knows concealment can look like mercy.

creatures.name: Solarin
creatures.description: It burns with a radiance too complete to trust, as though revelation itself has been weaponized into a guardian.

creatures.name: Sanguorath
creatures.description: Its red body exposes pulse as doctrine, a relic-warden that answers sacrifice with more of the same.

creatures.name: Firelet
creatures.description: Ember-bright and watchful, it leaves faint warm prints wherever it meets the ground.

creatures.name: Waterlet
creatures.description: Smooth and glimmering, it moves with the hush of shallow water and leaves a shine where it lingers.

creatures.name: Earthlet
creatures.description: Pebble-tough and patient, it carries the stillness of old paths in its heavy little gait.

creatures.name: Airlet
creatures.description: Feather-light and restless, it seems tugged forward by a wind no one else can feel.

creatures.name: Steamlet
creatures.description: A pale vapor clings to it, fogging glass and breath alike when it draws near.

creatures.name: Lavalet
creatures.description: Faint molten seams glow beneath its skin, and each careful step leaves a memory of heat.

creatures.name: Lightninglet
creatures.description: A small charge lives in its fine arcs, flashing sharp whenever it startles or shifts.

creatures.name: Mudlet
creatures.description: Soft with clay and silt, it leaves blurred little prints that dry into cracked patterns.

creatures.name: Icelet
creatures.description: Cool to the touch, it leaves delicate frost marks wherever it comes to rest.

creatures.name: Dustlet
creatures.description: Pale with grit, it carries a thin drifting wake as if the ground is always loosening behind it.

creatures.name: Crystalet
creatures.description: Clear shards rise from its crown, catching light in cold, glassy flashes.

creatures.name: Plantlet
creatures.description: Leaf-fringed and sunward, it carries the feeling of fresh growth just after rain.

creatures.name: Poisonlet
creatures.description: Sweet-sour and still, it gives off a faint violet haze that warns more than it welcomes.

creatures.name: Spiritlet
creatures.description: Half present and half remembered, it appears at the edge of sight before drifting gently into view.

creatures.name: Darklet
creatures.description: A soft black silhouette with pale points, it seems darker than the shadow beneath it.

creatures.name: Lightlet
creatures.description: Softly radiant, it brightens the air around it with a clean, early light.

creatures.name: Bloodlet
creatures.description: Red-warm and steady, it carries a quiet pulse that feels older than its size.

classes.Let: Tiny elemental sprites, each a playful embodiment of their element. Known for their curiosity and mischief, Lets flit about, leaving traces of their essence in their wake.
classes.Mane: Sprout-like tricksters, said to spring from the soil where magic seeps. They embody growth and playfulness, taking on different forms depending on their elemental nature.
classes.Pip: Pips are dragonlings of pure element, small in stature but fierce in spirit. They are curious, loyal, and mischievous, often following adventurers as companions. Each Pip reflects its elemental heart, with scales, tails, or frills shaped by fire, water, earth, and beyond.
classes.Horn: Horns are stocky guardians, born with elemental crests that grow into mighty symbols of strength. Fierce yet loyal, they’re known for their determination in battle and their instinct to protect their kin. Each Horn’s crest and hide reflect the element that fuels its spirit.
classes.Mask: Masks are enigmatic spirits bound to carved visages of elemental power. The mask they bear is more than decoration — it is their true face, etched with runes, cracks, and glowing veins that reveal the force within. Masks are rare and often seen as omens, appearing at the edges of mortal realms to watch, guide, or haunt.
classes.Wing: Wings are skyborn dragonkin revered as heralds of the horizon. Their flight stirs weather and wonder alike—embers, frost, and starlight are said to follow in their wake. Legends claim the first dawn rose from a Wing’s cry.
classes.Kin: Kins are cyclopean elementals shaped like lithe deer—emissaries of raw nature. They wander between realms as omens and guides, their forms shifting with the element they embody.
